sourceSummary.oneLine: SGS Korea test report for submitted SH5170U sample covering heavy metals, PBBs/PBDEs, phthalates, halogen content, antimony, and HBCDD.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents SGS Korea findings for the submitted sample; the report states results refer only to the sample(s) tested unless otherwise stated.
keyPoints: Issued Date is 2024. 07. 22 and Test Report No. is F690101/LF-CTSAYAA24-27731.
Client-submitted product name is SH5170U; sample number is AYAA24-27731.001.
Cadmium, lead, mercury, hexavalent chromium, antimony, listed PBBs/PBDEs, listed phthalates, bromine, chlorine, and HBCDD are reported as N.D.
The report states N.D. means not detected below the method detection limit.
The report states it is not related to Korea Laboratory Accreditation Scheme.
